kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09C_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09C_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09C" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2);

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2);

args.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON j.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT DISTINCT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON j.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT DISTINCT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON j.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL');

args.email: Please find attached the J09C mandatory reading export for internal processing.
